data.title: Dell Technologies Projects $15 Billion AI Server Revenue For FY26, Raises Dividend By 18% Amid A Mixed Quarter
data.description: Dell Technologies announced an 18% dividend increase and expects the AI server business to grow by at least $15 billion in FY26.

data.title: Tesla Rival Xiaomi Slashes Luxury EV Price By 35% To Challenge Model S, Porsche In China
data.description: Xiaomi cut the price of its luxury electric sedan SU7 Ultra by 35% to 529,900 yuan ($72,932) from 814,900 yuan ($111,842).

data.title: Waymo Offering 200,000 Robotaxi Rides Per Week, Says Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai: '20x Growth In Less Than 2 Years'
data.description: Waymo is now serving over 200,000 paid trips in its robotaxis each week, Alphabet Inc CEO Sundar Pichai said on Thursday.

data.title: Activist Investor ValueAct, Once Linked To Steve Ballmer's Microsoft Exit, Bought Meta, Visa, Sold Spotify In Q3: A Smart Bet?
data.description: Activist investor ValueAct Holdings, L.P., known for its role in Microsoft Corp. leadership changes a decade ago, disclosed significant portfolio adjustments in its third-quarter 13F filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission.
